methods.description: An ensemble of Last Glacial Maximum (LGM) simulations using the ECHAM6-wiso model, forced with different combinations of sea surface temperature (SST) and sea ice boundary conditions to investigate isotope-temperature slopes for LGM-to-PI climate change.

steps.description: Perform an ensemble of LGM simulations with ECHAM6-wiso, forced with different combinations of SST and sea ice boundary forcings.
steps.searchable_summary: run LGM simulations with ECHAM6-wiso using various SST and sea ice forcings

steps.description: Adjust SST to maintain consistency with sea ice extent data.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust SST to match sea ice extent

steps.description: Run PI and LGM simulations for 60 and 120 model years, respectively, using the last 30 model years for analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: execute PI and LGM simulations for specified durations

steps.description: Perform sensitivity simulations to evaluate impacts of lower MIROC 4m sea ice area fraction and isotopic composition of snow on sea ice.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct sensitivity simulations for sea ice and snow isotopic composition

methods.description: Evaluation of modeled δ 18 O of precipitation and snow values at ice core stations using observational data from Greenland and Antarctic ice cores for preindustrial and LGM climates.

steps.description: Use a selection of 6 Greenland and 11 Antarctic ice cores for the preindustrial and LGM climates.
steps.searchable_summary: select ice core data from Greenland and Antarctica

steps.description: Define observed δ 18 O values as averages over the last 200 years for the preindustrial period and in the 21 ± 1 ka period for the LGM.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate average δ 18 O values for specified periods

methods.description: Comparison of modeled δ 18 O of snow and temperature at polar ice core stations for different boundary conditions in LGM-PI SST changes.

steps.description: Compare modeled δ 18 O of snow and T 2 m at polar ice core stations for different boundary conditions in LGM-PI SST changes.
steps.searchable_summary: compare modeled δ 18 O and temperature with different SST conditions

steps.description: Evaluate model-data agreement using reconstructed SST fields.
steps.searchable_summary: assess model-data agreement with reconstructed SST

methods.description: Investigation of the impacts of AMOC strength on the modeled δ 18 O in polar regions using sea surface outputs from MIROC 4m simulation.

steps.description: Use sea surface outputs from MIROC 4m simulation with different LGM AMOC strengths as boundary conditions for ECHAM6-wiso.
steps.searchable_summary: apply MIROC 4m sea surface outputs with varying AMOC strengths

steps.description: Analyze LGM-to-PI changes in δ 18 O in Greenland controlled by changes in mean temperature.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze δ 18 O changes in Greenland due to temperature variations
